findings.title: PROP-072 FIRST-position hoist did NOT close the LLM mid-block skip; three cycles produced mis-titled commits with zero step4c sentinels
findings.root_cause: Two co-occurring defects: (1) LLM workspace-sync agent does not invoke `node monitor/scripts/sync-workspace-step4c.js` despite PROP-072 hoist; (2) when the node invocation is skipped, the subsequent `git add monitor/integrity/sync-workspace-runs-*.json ... 2>/dev/null || true` matches zero files but the index is already dirty from Step 3 (smart_copy + universal-pusher), so `git diff --cached --quiet` returns false and the commit fires under the WRONG title with WRONG contents. The PROP-072 SECONDARY backstop (`SENTINEL_COUNT_THIS_CYCLE` mtime heuristic) is broken because fresh clones reset all sentinel file mtimes — produces false-positives that fool the self-attestation check.
findings.action_taken: Authored PROP-073 with four sub-fixes: (1) stage-delta gating (PRE_ADD_STAGED / POST_ADD_STAGED) so 4c's commit only fires if `git add` actually added new sentinels; (2) filename-ISO timestamp parse to replace mtime heuristic in SENTINEL_COUNT_THIS_CYCLE; (3) `console.log('[PROP-066] wrote sentinel:', path.resolve(p))` in writeSentinel function — gives ground-truth signal when script IS invoked; (4) AGENT_NOTES guidance update adding 'step4c-mis-titled' bullet for future-regression visibility.
findings.operator_action_requested: Review PROP-073. If approved, issue DIRECTIVE-20260531-XXX (analogous to DIRECTIVE-20260531-012 for PROP-072) for a future tinker/claude session to implement the patches and verify the next 3 workspace-sync cycles.

findings.title: Backlog metrics healthy; no thresholds fired
findings.comment: Pipeline is in excellent throughput: 171 closures vs 13 new over the last 7 days. Decider's burndown work is keeping the queue young (oldest open is 7.7h). No-fire.
